events.title: Aus Powerlifting Championships 2026 – North Division
events.description:
@

Event Information

The 2026 Australian Powerlifting Championships are held in four easier to reach locations. Open, Junior and Youth age groups in Powerlifting, Bench Press and/or Deadlift. Special conditions for this event –

  • enter and lift at any location
  • local medals for each division + national medals and trophies for overall winners calculated on June 20th and presented at the Oceania Championships September 6th
  • double medalling i.e. all lifters ranked both in Open + their age group if U18, U23
  • you can lift at more than one location and your highest Total will count for national medals.
ENTER NOW

Event Organiser

Dave Napper

0458 352 153

dave@brisbanenorthbarbell.com

Events

Powerlifting
Bench Press only
Deadlift only

All events are Open + Youth, Junior

Location

Local Hotels

Eatons Hill Hotel eatonshillhotel.com.au

Aspley Carsel Motor Inn aspleycarsel.com.au

Aspley Motor Inn aspleymotorinn.com.au

Presentations

Division medals presented at the event

Australian Championships medals presented September 6th

Apparel

Check the PA/WP Rulebook
Recommended items at PA Shop

  •

Equipment

Samtek racks, bars and discs on platform & in warmup
events.excerpt: The big National event of the year made accessible in four locations — northern lifters, Brisbane North Barbell is your best site
